subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! The peoples of the world beseech, in the watches of night and day, the presence of the Dayspring of the Cause and the Manifestation of divine Revelation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد اهل عالم در لیالی و ایام لقای مشرق امر و مظهر وحی الهی را مسئلت
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
